name: terraform-skill
description: Claude Agent Skill providing comprehensive Terraform and OpenTofu best practices including testing strategies (native tests vs Terratest), module development patterns, CI/CD workflows (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI), security scanning (Trivy, Checkov), and production IaC patterns.

findings_summary.notes: High-quality individual developer project by antonbabenko, a well-known Terraform community expert and prolific open source contributor (creator of terraform-aws-modules and other popular Terraform resources). Very recently created (Jan 2026) with rapid star growth (1225 stars in ~6 weeks). License is 'Other/NOASSERTION' (Apache 2.0 referenced in README badge but no standard LICENSE file). No SECURITY.md. Purely a Claude Code skill containing guidance documents, decision matrices, and best practice patterns for Terraform/OpenTofu. No executable code that could pose runtime risks. Topics include security and compliance scanning guidance. Excellent documentation quality. Installed via Claude Code plugin marketplace.
